name: Manjunath Tevar
bio:
Mr. Manjunath Tevar is the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of Sri Ramakrishna Vivekananda Jnana Vikasa Shikshana Samste. He holds a B.Sc. and B.Ed. degree and has more than 5 years of experience in the education sector.

He is passionate about teaching and guiding students towards academic excellence and moral values. As a skilled facilitator, he has successfully conducted many classes, workshops, and awareness programs for students.

Under his leadership, the organization focuses on quality education, personality development, and social awareness among students, especially in rural areas. His dedication and commitment continue to inspire both teachers and students to achieve their goals and contribute positively to society.
message:
Namaste,

My name is Manjunath Tevar, and I have been serving as the CEO of Sri Ramakrishna Vivekananda Jnana Vikasa Shikshana Samste for the past 2 years. It is a great honor and responsibility for me to be part of this organization that works for the education and overall development of children.

Our institution focuses not only on academic excellence but also on teaching values, discipline, and cultural awareness to students. Along with education, we also organize social awareness programs in areas such as health, cleanliness, environmental protection, and community development to create awareness among students and the public.

With the support of dedicated teachers, volunteers, and well-wishers, we are striving to shape the bright future of our students and contribute positively to society.

I feel proud and grateful to be part of this noble mission that contributes to the progress of society.

Thank you.

name: Mr. Prakash Hanumanthappa Jogin
bio: Mr. Prakash Hanumanthappa Jogin holds M.A. and B.Ed. qualifications. He serves as the Vice President of the organization and actively participates in all activities and functions of the institution.

name: Mr. Rudrappa Shivaji Murari
bio: Mr. Rudrappa Shivaji Murari has completed P.U.C. (Pre-University Course). He serves as the Vice President of the institution and is a social worker by profession. He carries out institutional activities with great interest and dedication.

name: Poornima Naik
bio:
Namaste,

My name is Poornima Naik, and I have been serving as an Account Assistant at Sri Ramakrishna Vivekananda Jnana Vikasa Shikshana Samste for the past 4 years. It has been a wonderful experience to work in an organization that is committed to the education and overall development of children.

In my role, I assist in maintaining financial records and ensuring that the accounts of the institution are managed properly. I feel proud to contribute to an organization that works sincerely to provide quality education, values, and discipline to students.

I am grateful for the opportunity to be part of this noble mission that is helping shape the bright future of many children.

Thank you.

name: Mr. Veeranagouda Ninganagouda Marigoudar
bio: Mr. Veeranagouda Ninganagouda Marigoudar holds M.A. and M.Ed. qualifications. He serves as the President of the institution and carries out all responsibilities and organizational activities with great care and dedication.

name: Mrs. Lakshmi Veeranagouda Marigoudar
bio: Mrs. Lakshmi Veeranagouda Marigoudar holds B.A. and B.Ed. qualifications. She serves as the Secretary of the institution and is also the Headmistress of Shri Sharada Mata Public School. She actively participates in all institutional activities.

name: Mrs. Bharati Shankaragouda Patil
bio: Mrs. Bharati Shankaragouda Patil holds M.Sc. and B.Ed. qualifications. She serves as the Treasurer of the institution and is a teacher by profession. She actively participates in all the activities of the institution.

name: Mr. Sridharagouda Shankaragouda Patil
bio:
Qualification: I.T.I., J.T.T.C.

Role: He carries out all the activities of this institution with great interest and dedication.

name: Mr. Basavaraj Shankareppa Lagalatti
bio: Mr. Basavaraj Shankareppa Lagalatti holds a B.A. qualification. He serves as a Member of the institution and carries out all institutional activities with great interest and dedication.

name: Mrs. Saraswati Shankareppa Lagalatti
bio: Mrs. Saraswati Shankareppa Lagalatti holds M.Sc. and B.Ed. qualifications. She serves as a Member of the institution and actively participates in all the activities of the institution.

name: Mr. Eeranna Shankareppa Lagalatti
bio: Mr. Eeranna Shankareppa Lagalatti holds P.U.C. and I.T.I. qualifications. He serves as a Member of the institution and actively participates in all institutional activities.

name: Rajeshwari Ambannavar
bio: My name is Rajeshwari Ambannavar. I have been associated with Sri Ramakrishna Vivekananda Jnana Vikasa Shikshana Samste as a volunteer for several years. It has been a very fulfilling experience for me to serve in this organization. Through this service, I have seen how the institution works with great dedication for the education and overall development of children. Along with studies, the students are also guided with good values, discipline, culture, and respect towards others. I feel very happy and proud to be part of this noble mission. The work done by this organization is truly inspiring and it is helping in shaping a bright future for many children. Thank you.

name: Shreekant Ambannavar
bio:
Namaste,

My name is Shreekant Ambannavar. I have been serving as a volunteer with Sri Ramakrishna Vivekananda Jnana Vikasa Shikshana Samste for more than 10 years. It has been a very meaningful and inspiring journey for me.

Through this service, I have had the opportunity to support children in their education and overall development. This organization not only focuses on academic learning but also teaches students discipline, good values, culture, and respect for elders.

Being a part of this mission gives me great satisfaction and pride. I am grateful for the opportunity to serve and contribute to shaping the bright future of children and society.

Thank you.

name: Sudhkar Kajkar
bio: I am very happy to support SRV NGO. The organization is doing wonderful work for children's education and development. It is inspiring to see how the team is helping students with learning materials and opportunities for a better future. I feel proud to contribute to such a meaningful cause.
